description: E2E Foundation Tests — Write Playwright tests covering authentication (dev bypass), landing page (idea CRUD, search, filter, soft delete), theme switching (light/dark), and i18n (German/English). All E2E infrastructure already exists (Playwright config, page objects, helpers, docker-compose.e2e.yml). This milestone writes the actual test spec files.

userStories.title: E2E Auth Bypass Tests
userStories.description: As an E2E test suite, I want comprehensive auth bypass tests so that dev user login, role-based access, user switching, and route protection are verified end-to-end
acceptanceCriteria: All 4 dev users (Alice Admin, Bob Reviewer, Carol User, Dave User) can be selected and authenticated
User identity (name and role) is displayed correctly in the navbar for each dev user
Role-based navbar visibility works: Carol (User role) cannot see Review or Admin links
Reviewer role access verified: Bob can see Review link and navigate to /reviews
Admin role access verified: Alice can see Admin link and navigate to /admin
Dev user switching works: switch from Carol to Bob, identity changes, role-based UI updates
Route protection enforced: Carol navigating to /admin is redirected or sees 403
Route protection enforced: Carol navigating to /reviews is redirected or sees 403
All tests use Playwright page objects (NavbarPage, LandingPage, auth helpers)
Typecheck passes (cd e2e && npx tsc --noEmit)
userStories.notes:
Files: e2e/auth.spec.ts
Gotchas: Dev user IDs hardcoded (Alice=...0001, Bob=...0002, Carol=...0003, Dave=...0004). Route protection may redirect or 403. Role-based links via user.roles array.

userStories.title: E2E Landing Page — Idea Lists & Creation
userStories.description: As an E2E test suite, I want tests for landing page idea creation and list display so that the idea creation flow and idea card rendering are verified end-to-end
acceptanceCriteria: Empty state test: new user (no ideas) sees empty My Ideas list with appropriate empty state message
Idea creation from hero test: type message in hero textarea, submit → navigated to /idea/<uuid>, first chat message visible
My Ideas list test: create 2 ideas, verify both appear in My Ideas section with correct titles
Idea card displays test: verify idea cards show title, state badge (Open), timestamp
Navigate to idea test: click idea card → navigated to correct /idea/<uuid>
Multiple ideas in various states test: create ideas, use API to submit one for review, verify state badges (Open, In Review) display correctly
All tests use Playwright page objects (LandingPage, WorkspacePage, api helpers)
Typecheck passes (cd e2e && npx tsc --noEmit)
userStories.notes:
Files: e2e/landing-creation.spec.ts
Gotchas: UUID navigation uses regex /\/idea\/.+/. Badge variants: open, in_review, accepted, dropped, rejected. Use submitIdea() API helper for in_review state. Empty state text in i18n.

userStories.title: E2E Landing Page — Search, Filter, Soft Delete
userStories.description: As an E2E test suite, I want tests for landing page search, filters, and soft delete so that idea discovery and trash management are verified end-to-end
acceptanceCriteria: Search by title test: create 3 ideas with distinct titles, search for one → only matching idea shown
Filter by state test: create ideas in different states (Open, In Review), apply state filter → only matching state shown
Filter by ownership test: create owned idea + accept collaboration on another (via API) → filter My Ideas vs Collaborating works
Soft delete test: delete an idea → undo toast appears, idea moves to Trash list
Undo soft delete test: delete idea, click undo within toast timeout → idea restored to original list
Trash list test: delete idea, verify it appears in Trash section with appropriate indicator
Soft delete does not appear in active lists test: deleted idea not visible in My Ideas or Collaborating
All tests use Playwright page objects and API helpers for setup
Typecheck passes (cd e2e && npx tsc --noEmit)
userStories.notes:
Files: e2e/landing-search-filter.spec.ts
Gotchas: Toast undo timeout ~5-8s. Trash is 4th list section. Use seedIdeaWithCollaborator() helper. State filter: All|Open|In Review|Accepted|Dropped|Rejected. Ownership: All|My Ideas|Collaborating.

userStories.title: E2E Theme Support
userStories.description: As an E2E test suite, I want theme switching tests so that light/dark mode toggle, persistence, and contrast are verified end-to-end
acceptanceCriteria: Default theme test: fresh page load respects OS prefers-color-scheme or defaults to light
Toggle to dark mode test: open user menu → click theme toggle → all visible elements switch to dark theme (html.classList contains 'dark')
Toggle back to light mode test: switch to dark, then back to light → all elements correct (html.classList does not contain 'dark')
Theme persistence test: switch to dark, reload page → dark mode persists (localStorage has theme preference)
Contrast ratios test: verify key elements meet 4.5:1 contrast ratio in both light and dark mode (use axe-core spot check on navbar, buttons, cards)
Theme applies across pages test: switch to dark on landing page, navigate to workspace (/idea/:id) → dark mode maintained
All tests use Playwright and @axe-core/playwright for accessibility checks
Typecheck passes (cd e2e && npx tsc --noEmit)
userStories.notes:
Files: e2e/theme.spec.ts
Gotchas: Toggle in UserDropdown (open menu first). localStorage key 'theme', values 'light'|'dark'. Dark mode = html.classList contains 'dark'. Use @axe-core/playwright: injectAxe(), checkA11y() for contrast. Check navbar, buttons, cards.

userStories.title: E2E i18n Support
userStories.description: As an E2E test suite, I want language switching tests so that German/English toggle, persistence, and translation coverage are verified end-to-end
acceptanceCriteria: Default language test: fresh page load shows German UI labels (default language is German)
Switch to English test: open user menu → select English from language dropdown → all visible labels change to English
Switch back to German test: switch to English, then back to German → all labels correct
Language persistence test: switch to English, reload page → English persists (localStorage has language preference)
Language applies across pages test: switch to English on landing page, navigate to workspace (/idea/:id) → English maintained
All critical labels translated test: verify key elements (navbar links, buttons, headings, form labels) have translations in both languages (spot check, not exhaustive)
All tests verify specific UI text in both languages using regex for flexibility
Typecheck passes (cd e2e && npx tsc --noEmit)
userStories.notes:
Files: e2e/i18n.spec.ts
Gotchas: Selector in UserDropdown (open menu first). localStorage key 'i18nextLng', values 'de'|'en'. Spot check: navbar, hero, buttons, badges. DE: Ideen, Bewertungen, Admin. EN: Ideas, Reviews, Admin. Use regex for flexible matching.
